title: sisyrinchium minus subsp. minus
intro: Sisyrinchium minus subsp. minus, also known as Blue Eyed Grass, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Iridaceae family. It is native to North America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing pain. The plant has various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues like bronchitis, and acting as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Sisyrinchium minus subsp. minus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
